title: 11.8in/30cm Halloween Pumpkin Plush Toy, Orange Halloween Stuffed Pumpkins Fluffy Plush Toy Soft Halloweenss Pumpkins Teddy Cute Festive Pumpkin Cushion for Decorations
features: 【Size】The orange Halloween pumpkin plush toy measures approximately 30 x 21 x 16 cm (approx. 12 x 8 x 6.3 inches), a size that makes it perfect for holiday decorations and gifts, creating a festive atmosphere as well as having practical and decorative.

【Soft and Cosy】Choose a soft fleece material for the outer material and inner filling of the orange Halloween stuffed pumpkin fluffy plush toy, they will usually be very soft and suitable for cuddling or using as a cushion when you need to soothe and relax.

【Cute Designs】Halloween pumpkin plush toys are designed to be very cute, pumpkin plush toys come in a bright orange colour that mimics the colour of the traditional Halloween pumpkin, they have a rounded shape and a green stem on top. This design makes them not only suitable for children but also popular with adults.

【Decorative Function】As part of the holiday decorations, these soft Halloween plush toys can add Halloween spirit to the home or office. They can be placed on sofas, beds, chairs, or used as desktop decorations to add fun and festive atmosphere to Halloween.
【Attention】For easy shipping, our cute festive pumpkin cushion is packed in vacuum compression, the product will be back to its original state in 24-48 hours after opening the package.

This design makes them not only suitable for children but also popular with adults. They can be placed on sofas, beds, chairs, or used as desktop decorations to add fun and festive atmosphere to Halloween.
